Measurable Success

Where the partnership is delivering today
99.96%
Backup Reliability at Scale
684,000+ protection, replication, and security jobs completed in the latest reporting window with a 99.96% success rate — consistent, audit-ready protection across on-prem and Azure workloads.
0 P1s
Support Health Trending Up
No P1 or high-priority cases are active at this time — all open issues are currently P2 or lower. The HOUBRIK_01 hardware health check case is resolved, and every open item has active Rubrik ownership and weekly review cadence.
7 / 7
Fleet Fully Current & Healthy
All seven clusters — RICBRIK_01, HOUBRIK_01, both vaults, both Azure cloud clusters, and Edge — run the same current release (9.5.1) with no version upgrades required and no cluster above 75% capacity.
100%
Threat Monitoring Everywhere
Threat Monitoring and Exchange protection are at 100% adoption, CDM MSSQL at 92% — every backup is continuously scanned for ransomware indicators, with CrowdStrike intel feeds integrated.
1.8 PB+
Immutable, Air-Gapped Copies
Production data is replicated to dedicated vault clusters and locked with immutable snapshots in Azure — the recovery foundation regulators and cyber insurers expect from a title insurance leader.
Active
Identity Resilience in Production
Active Directory domain controllers across every Stewart domain and Microsoft Entra ID are backed up and monitored for identity security violations — protecting the control plane attackers target first.

Maximize What You Already Own

Entitled capabilities to activate and test — no new licensing required
Orchestrated Disaster Recovery
Turn recovery plans into tested, one-click runbooks — proving RTOs for closing-critical systems.
Cyber Recovery
Rehearse ransomware recovery in isolated clean rooms before an incident forces the issue.
Active Directory Orchestrated Forest Recovery
Every Stewart domain controller is already protected — the next step is testing full forest recovery so an AD-down event never stalls a closing.
Data Security Posture (DSPM)
Broaden sensitive-data discovery to the full estate — know where NPI and closing documents live.

Where We Can Partner Next

Closing coverage gaps across Stewart Title's modern data estate
SaaS Coverage Gap
M365 Protection with Autonomous Business Recovery
Exchange Online, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams hold closing correspondence, escrow communications, and policy documents that Microsoft's native retention was never designed to recover at scale. Autonomous Business Recovery prioritizes and restores the most business-critical M365 data first after an attack.
Why it matters for Stewart: Wire-fraud and BEC attacks target title companies' mailboxes specifically — rapid, prioritized M365 recovery directly protects closings in flight.
DevOps Coverage Gap
Azure DevOps & GitHub Protection
Stewart's Azure DevOps agents and build pipelines are already visible in your protected estate — but the repos, work items, and pipeline definitions behind STEPS, StewartConnect, and Sitecore are not. Protect the source code and delivery pipelines your digital closing experience depends on.
Why it matters for Stewart: A deleted or ransomed repo halts every release; code is now regulated operational data for financial services firms.
Cloud Storage Gap
Azure Blob & S3 Protection
Blob storage accounts (Sitecore content, logs, application data) appear across your Azure subscriptions today with classification only — not recoverable copies. Extend the same immutable, threat-scanned protection your VMs enjoy to object storage in Azure and AWS.
Why it matters for Stewart: Document images and unstructured closing files increasingly land in object storage — a growing blind spot in cyber recovery scope.
★ Newly Announced
Rubrik Agent Cloud — Discover, Monitor & Govern, Rewind
As Stewart adopts AI agents, Agent Cloud provides the control plane: Discover every agent operating across the enterprise, Monitor & Govern their actions against policy, and Rewind — surgically undo unintended agent changes to data and systems.
Why it matters for Stewart: Agentic AI in a regulated title/escrow environment needs auditability and an undo button before it touches production data.
★ Newly Announced
Annapurna — AI-Ready Data, Safely
Annapurna lets AI applications securely search and retrieve from Rubrik-protected data via API — turning decades of backed-up documents into fuel for GenAI initiatives without exposing production systems or violating data governance.
Why it matters for Stewart: Title plant records and prior policy files become searchable AI context — with sensitive-data guardrails built in.
The bottom line: Stewart Title's core estate is protected, current, and measurably healthy. The next phase of the partnership extends that same resilience to SaaS, DevOps, cloud object storage, and the emerging AI layer — so every system that touches a closing is covered by one recovery and governance platform.
